nasb.text: When these went into Micah’s house and took the graven image, the ephod and household idols and the molten image, the priest said to them, “What are you doing?”

esv.text: And when these went into Micah’s house and took the carved image, the ephod, the household gods, and the metal image, the priest said to them, “What are you doing?”

cnv.text: 當那五個人進了米迦的家，拿走雕像、以弗得、神像和鑄像的時候，祭司就問他們：“你們作甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 祭司见那五人进入米迦家拿走雕刻的偶像、以弗得、家庭神像及金属铸像，就问他们：“你们在做什么？”
